description_long: This object is a classic assault rifle with a distinctive curved magazine and a robust, utilitarian design. The receiver and barrel assembly are constructed from dark metal, while the stock, handguard, and pistol grip are made of wood with a rich, reddish-brown grain. The rifle features a fixed wooden stock and a standard-length barrel, with iron sights mounted along the top. The magazine is a detachable, curved box type, typical of rifles designed for rapid reloading. The overall finish is matte, with visible metal and wood textures, and the rifle appears well-balanced for shoulder firing.
description: A dark metal and wood assault rifle with a curved magazine, fixed wooden stock, and iron sights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the wooden stock, curved magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Barrel-end view highlighting the muzzle, front sight, and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, curved magazine, and receiver details.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock, rear sight, and the alignment of the barrel.
